title: Activity report helper
lede: Collects your applications for a month so you can copy them field by field into Arbetsförmedlingen's activity report.

counter.text: {count, plural, =0 {No applications} =1 {# application} other {# applications}} in {month}.

empty.text: No applications to report for {month}. When you mark an application as applied it appears in the month you applied.

error.title: Could not load the activity report
error.rateLimited: Too many requests. Try again in a moment.
